note: Created TcpEchoSyncAsyncComparisonTests.cs with 7 tests: 4 size-variant sync-vs-async comparison tests (1B, 100B, 1KB, 64KB), 1 async non-blocking verification, and 2 cross-path tests (sync server + async client, async server + sync client). All tests compile and follow established integration test patterns. Cannot run against real tunnel in this environment (stub library), same as all other integration tests.
